title: Calcaratolobelia villaregalis
intro: Calcaratolobelia villaregalis, commonly known as villaregal's lobelia, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of conditions like arthritis and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of villaregal's lobelia include alkaloids, such as lobeline and lobelanine, as well as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Villaregal's lobelia is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which are commonly used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
taxonomy: Unfortunately, I do not have any information on the classification of Calcaratolobelia villaregalis.
